campaign_promises: Expand the RV to Home pilot program citywide (permanently removed 100+ RVs; housed 146 individuals)
Establish a dedicated Department of Homelessness to break organizational silos
Improve transparency and coordination across homelessness service agencies
Chair the Public Safety Committee with focus on response-time and resource allocation
Fund and hire LAFD Wildland Hands Crews to respond to wildfires
Invest in equestrian communities and keep equestrian zoning intact
Advance neighborhood infrastructure and services (sidewalks, streetlights, tree canopy)
Support economic resiliency for small businesses in the Northeast Valley
Push innovation and effectiveness in city government operations
Invest in at-risk youth intervention programs and family support
campaign_platform.source_note: monicaforcitycouncil.com redirects to an unrelated domain; platform drawn from cd7.lacity.gov coverage
